name: agency-attribution
description: Both agents performed actions. They must figure out who did what.
task_a: You performed 2 actions: moved object from (0,0) to (1,0), and removed object at (2,2). Agent B also performed 2 actions but you don't know what. Exchange action descriptions and write ANSWER.md listing ALL 4 actions with who did each (A or B).
task_b: You performed 2 actions: added object at (0,2), and moved object from (1,1) to (2,1). Agent A also performed 2 actions but you don't know what. Exchange action descriptions and write ANSWER.md listing ALL 4 actions with who did each (A or B).
